description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Make CI (DeepLearning for Ubuntu Linux) that runs on every push to all branches and on all pull requests to any branch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to test different combinations of YANEURAOU_ENGINE_DEEP_TENSOR_RT edition, g++-10, g++-11, clang++-11, clang++-12, clang++-13, and clang++-14 compilers, normal target, and AVX2 architecture. Install the required compiler, CUDA, and TensorRT, then run a build script with customized flags.
